events.message: doc: Align documented scripts with CI ones

events.body:
Concept ACK

While you're at it, can you also adjust this here (if you agree with it)?
```
       * including an entry for `### ABI Compatibility` if it doesn't exist that mentions the library soname of the release,
```
The idea is to remove "that mentions the library soname of the release". We had just discussed this among the maintainers. We believe that adding the soname is probably a bit confusing for the average user, and we don't think it's that important to have it in the changelog. That's why we didn't follow this suggestion.
